feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Export data from app Display Credit Exposure
entry.content:
Is it possible to export data (cds view, odata service?) from the app Display Credit Exposure? We would like to have Credit exposure totals (open orders - 100 and open invoices - 200) in one table with Credit Exposure ( the business partner ID. credit segment etc.)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CREDIT NOTE DUE DATE - SAP PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION
entry.content:
A credit note without reference to the invoice is always due on the base date. According to OSS note 17410, by entering a 'V' in the Reference Document Number field, the due date is correctly calculated. We need to automatically configure this field during the posting process between the SD invoice and the FI invoice.

In previous releases, the SDVFX002 (or similar) enhancement was used, but in SAP Public Cloud, we are unable to locate where to make this adjustment.

Any suggestions?

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Adding Value Help (additional annotations) to Generated CDS views
entry.content:
Hi Dear SAP Community,

We are currently trying to create a report using the "Manage KPI and Reports" app in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

We followed these steps:

  1. Generate a custom CDS view using the "Custom CDS View" app.
  2. Create a query based on the CDS view in the "Custom Analytical Queries" app.
  3. Generate the report using the "Manage KPI and Reports" app.

Everything works fine until one of our customers requested value help for certain fields.

As seen, we don’t have any value help for the Project ID.

Below my demo Custom CDS view just to show what I tried.

Is there any chance of adding value help to this report, or are there possible extension options?

I tried to copy the generated CDS query and add value help there. Obviously, it didn’t work because we are not allowed to use unreleased objects.

 

Thank you very much in advance,

Best regards,

Rufat

entry.title: Limitations in Capacity Planning in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi!

I hope you're doing ! 

We are currently at a critical stage with the client, as most of their planning and capacity management is done through the CM25 and CM27 transactions in SAP R/3. We are concerned that the Public Cloud might have more limitations in terms of the capacity planning apps available, particularly with the Capacity Scheduling Board and Capacity Planning Table.

At this point, we are unsure whether the Live Cache will activate the required functionalities for these panels and tables. This uncertainty is a key concern for us as we need to ensure we can provide the necessary capabilities for the client moving forward.

We would appreciate any further insights or updates you can provide on this matter.

Best regards,

entry.title: create a new additional product description for different languages in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
I would like to know if there is any way to create a new additional product description for many languages using sap app

 

I tried to use mass update feature but it allows only to update product description in the product master data and not to create a new one. Since there are more than thousands of products, we can not do it manually. Could you please let us know if it possible to create it directly via migration template or with some app?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Quality notification partner SAP CLOUD PUBLIC EDITION
entry.content:
I am creating this question because we found that for sap public cloud, it is not possible to modify the partner determination procedures form the CBC, by the contraty, it is just possible to access in diplay mode.

However, for a project, My client has requested to insert a department/group as responsible partner and not just a sap user, and to all the people inside that department/group, send the notification or task. They need to insert as a partner in a quality notification, each department of their company, not just a user but the whole department. I have try with the manage teams and responsabilities app, but we did not find a solution. The last an unique way that I know it could work is doing it from the customizing, as in the private and in the on-premise solution it is possible to do it, and this request would be solved doing this process.

But in the public cloud, I am not allowed to implement a new partner determination procedure in which I want to implement the partner function AB (department responsible) inside the quality notifications.

I need your help in order to understand if there is another workaround for this problem in which I can insert a department of the company inside a notification as a partner.

Maybe I found a way to solve this, using the position responsible ST type of partner. The problem is that there is no data available in the search help. There is no data for position responsible and I can not find a way to insert data for this type of partner. Do you know how to do it? Could you help me with this?

entry.title: TRM payment date in Transaction Manager greyed out
entry.content:
Hello,

In S/4HANA Public Cloud TRM when creating or changing financial transaction, field payment date is greyed out. 

The customer has the requirement to use payment date different from due date (payment date is shifted compared to due date). For example, the due date is the last day of the month, and payment date is fifth day in the following period (payment date = due date + 5). The posting date must correspond to the due date.

In both screens, condition details and cash flow, the payment date is greyed out and cannot be changed. 

Are there configuration steps to allow payment date to be defined as per requirement?

 

Kind regards,

Slađana

entry.title: HYR2502 upgrade issue- Error in Account Determination of GL Account - Urgent
entry.content:
After the latest system upgrade to release 2502, we are facing an issue with new postings to a GL account. The error "Account is Blocked for Posting" is raised and the GL account involved is a zero balance clearing account. 

The error is mostly encountered as "Error in Account Determination for zero balance clearing account" and "Account is Blocked for Posting" due to which it is not possible to make postings to the GL account and post the journal entries. 

Checking the account masterdata it is noted that the account has Blocked for posting=Yes setting enabled. 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Return Process during PGR Required Movement Type 655 Goods Returns QI (Quality Inspection) Required.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We need your help on this specific return process. Our business requirement is that during PGR goods will move to quality inspection. I have checked through the order type CBAR standard return process, where I am getting only 653 and 657 movement types triggered automatically as per follow-up activity. And in the Lean Return CBRE, only 651 and 653 are available to determine. As you knew, we can't create any schedule lines in the public cloud. In this case, I need your support; how could I achieve my client requirements?

Client wants during outbound delivery for returns. Order Specific Goods should be under Quality Inspection, with below points

  1. QC blocked the FG item where it needed rework to ensure the required quality.
  2. Customer returned goods are sorted and reworked for ensuring the required quality of FG items.

Please Guide us How could we achieve it? 

Thanks
Hasnat

entry.title: Access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-cloud
entry.content:
I know that we can access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-premise, but is it possible to access the HANA database attached to a S/4HANA on-cloud?

Would there be a difference between the Private and Public Editions of S/4HANA on-cloud

We want to connect Datasphere to the HANA database on a S/4HANA on-cloud.

Thanks.

Regards,

Mel Calucin

entry.title: Enter Manual Contract Accruals
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a question regarding the “ Enter Manual Contract Accruals “ feature in the Event-Based Revenue Recognition - Service Documents

We are using the Revenue Recognition Methods for Service Orders “ CCOCC and CCOCF ”, and we have a scenario were in a specific period the deferred cost is bigger than the deferred revenue for a single item (Unrealized Costs).

The issue is if we run the Event Base Revenue recognition for this item in the service order, the Income statement will be impacted with loss value for this period, as the system recognized all the deferred values.

Our question, can we use the “ Enter Manual Contract Accruals “ feature to shift recognizing the cost to next period?

 Can we change the account associated in the feature ?

entry.title: Can't find the Display Operating G/L Accounts app
entry.content:
We should have access to the "Display Operating G/L Accounts" tile.
The user has the roles BR_GL_ACCOUNTANT and business catalog SAP_FIN_BC_FACT_GLACC_PC assigned
However, can't find the Display Operating G/L Accounts app in the search bar.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Supplier {Tax Type} field usage in App " Set Tax Rates - Purchasing"
entry.content:
SAP gave table 181 having field tax type {J_11AFITP in the condition, how ever it wasn't used in any purchasing pricing condition therefor when you maintain condition with the app  "Set Tax Rates - Purchasing", the restriction was hardcode with account type "K" - not editable

and SAP asked to raise future development request for realization 

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/339175

kindly help to vote it incase it's also useful for you.

Best regards

Patrick

entry.title: How to set up a backflush in the product master
entry.content:
Hello.I have a question about the master setting of the product.

The backflush field is enabled on the material creation app.

I don't have a backflush field in the product master management app, so please let me know where I can set it.

thank you.

 

제품 마스터

entry.title: What is the Customer PAN NO CDS View in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi 

Am not able to find the Correct CDS View for Customer PAN No,

I have already used 

I_BuPaIdentification

 I_SUPPLIERWITHHOLDINGTAX

I_BusinessPartnerTaxNumber

I_BPUsrExternalID

but I didn't find any solution,

any one can you please suggest me what is the correct CDS View to find Customer PAN No

entry.title: How to check which scope items are activated in our S/4HANA Cloud system?
entry.content:
How can we check which scope items are activated in our S/4HANA Cloud system?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change the Functional Location of Equipment within the Same Maintenance Plant
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

In the EAM module, if I change the functional location and move it to another maintenance plant, it will clears fields that related to maintenance plant, company code, and possibly controlling area.

How about changing the functional location within the same maintenance plant? Will it result in any changes or any issues?

Thank you 🙂

entry.title: Tax Code and Tax determination in the manual settlement document
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using Vertex for tax determination. While creating the manual settlement document (0S32), the tax code and tax amount are not populating at the item level. The user needs to check the tax at the line item (in the condition tab) and then enter it manually. Otherwise, the system does not allow saving the document due to the gross and net amount mismatch. In the case of automatic settlement, the taxes are determined automatically.

Is there any way to determine the tax code and tax amount automatically or at the time of saving the manual settlement document?

Please suggest. 

Thanks and Regards,

Pankaj

entry.title: Analytical tool connection to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, can we connect to SAP S/4HANA Public cloud with some analytical tool like Power Query or Power Bi? If yes, how? 

Thank you 

regards

entry.title: YCOA Chart of Account
entry.content:
Hi, 

Our customer is planning to use the predelivered COA in there Public Cloud system. But we would need some assistance related to 2 topics in the area of COA. 

1. We've been reading about the possibility of not transporting GL-accounts into P if they planning to not use them. In several places they are refering to tick the box "GL account not used" in the master data of the account. However, it seems like we don't have that possibilty. Is this something that has been changed and not longer a possibilty? 

Question 2: 
We've also been discussing Field Status Groups and potentials changes in specific accounts. However, is there a way to extract the full COA YCOA with the information of field status in one go, like I'd have collected the data from one table if we'd been running a project with a private cloud instead. 

Kind Regards, Sanne
